description_long: This vending machine is themed as a Pokémon Center, featuring a modern, rounded design with a prominent illuminated sign on top displaying the Pokémon Center logo and Poké Ball symbol. The main product display is a large, transparent front panel showcasing rows of plush Pokémon toys, with a retrieval slot at the bottom. On one side, there are digital screens displaying animated Pokémon scenes, and a small cup or bottle holder is attached. The rear side features a large monitor with a game controller, suggesting interactive entertainment. The machine is primarily white and gray with light blue accents, and includes various stickers and decorative elements. Payment and selection interfaces are located on the front, adjacent to the product display.
description: A Pokémon Center-themed vending machine with a plush toy display, digital screens, and interactive entertainment features, finished in white and gray with blue accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing two digital screens with Pokémon scenes, a cup or bottle holder, and a mostly solid white panel.
description_view_1: Front view with a transparent display window revealing plush Pokémon toys, a payment interface, selection buttons, and the Pokémon Center sign on top.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large monitor displaying a Pokémon game, a controller, and a smooth white surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single large screen showing Ash and Pikachu, plus some small stickers and the Pokémon Center sign visible above.
attribute_display_panel: A large, rectangular digital display panel is located on the rear side, showing a Pokémon game scene; additional smaller screens are present on the sides displaying animated content.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface with a card reader and possible contactless terminal is located on the front right side, adjacent to the product display window.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual selection buttons is present on the front, next to the product display, each likely corresponding to a row of plush toys.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular retrieval slot is located at the bottom of the front display window, with a flap for accessing purchased items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A large illuminated Pokémon Center sign with the Poké Ball logo is mounted on top of the machine, with additional small stickers and themed graphics on the sides.
